name: io.github.wyre-technology/proofpoint-mcp
title: Proofpoint
description: MCP server for Proofpoint TAP — threat intelligence, forensics, quarantine, and email security.

environmentVariables.name: PROOFPOINT_SERVICE_PRINCIPAL
environmentVariables.description: Proofpoint TAP service principal (API user identifier)

environmentVariables.name: PROOFPOINT_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Proofpoint TAP API base URL (defaults to https://tap-api-v2.proofpoint.com)

environmentVariables.name: MCP_TRANSPORT
environmentVariables.description: Transport mode for the server. Set to 'stdio' for local CLI use; the image defaults to 'http' for gateway hosting.

environmentVariables.name: AUTH_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Credential source: 'env' reads vars locally, 'gateway' expects header injection from the WYRE MCP Gateway.

environmentVariables.name: LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Log verbosity: debug, info, warn, error
